name: testVerifyCloseAddCompanyDialogWhenCloseButtonIsClicked
description: Verify that clicking the Close button successfully closes the 'Add Company' dialog.
descriptionHtml: Verify that clicking the Close button successfully closes the 'Add Company' dialog.

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Verify that clicking the Close button successfully closes the 'Add Company' dialog.

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Click on the 'Close' button to close form
Verify: the 'Add Company' dialog is no longer visible
